dc:title: Journal of Cognition Corpus (2017-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: cognitive science
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A complete corpus of 447 articles published in Journal of Cognition between 2017 and 2026, converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. This is the complete set of retrievable, convertible articles from the journal's full CrossRef-registered output (457 DOIs), not a sample.

dc:provenance.sampling: Not a sample -- complete corpus of all retrievable, convertible articles
dc:provenance.pdf_source: Article landing page HTML scrape (journalofcognition.org/articles/{doi}), Unpaywall's reported PDF URL does not resolve correctly for this journal
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against CrossRef DOI used for sampling (2026-06-20)
dc:provenance.quality_audit: 2 inaccessible PDFs excluded, 1 oversized PDF excluded, 5 DOIs corrected, 10 missing titles backfilled from CrossRef
